name: CINNAMON
subtitle: Voltage Controlled State Variable Filter
summary: A 5 HP voltage-controlled state variable filter with simultaneous LP, BP, and HP outputs. Features a drive switch for input saturation, character switches that alter resonance behaviour and self-oscillation waveform, a V/Oct input, and full self-oscillation capability producing sine waves at 0°, 90°, and 180° at the three outputs.
